source_title_or_owner: EJKM Knowledge Management Cycle model (Meyer-Zack lineage)

Foundational data-information-knowledge-wisdom hierarchy; grounds why raw collection (ACQUIRE) is not yet decision-useful and must pass through PROCESS.

Corporate counter-intelligence practitioner literature (crown-jewel protection, insider-threat, source protection); newer/less-settled field so scored Keter - validate before any hard doctrine claim.
